# @primo-brutality/ui

> Neo-brutalist React Native component library built with NativeWind v4.

## Setup (required before using components)

1. Install: `npm install @primo-brutality/ui nativewind` (peer deps: react >=18, react-native >=0.74)
2. Import global CSS in app entry: `import "@primo-brutality/ui/global.css"`
3. Add Tailwind preset to `tailwind.config.js`:
   ```js
   module.exports = {
     content: [
       "./app/**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}",
       "./src/**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}",
       "./node_modules/@primo-brutality/ui/dist/**/*.{js,mjs}",
     ],
     presets: [require("@primo-brutality/ui/tailwind-preset")],
   };
   ```
4. Follow NativeWind v4 Metro/Babel setup: https://www.nativewind.dev/getting-started/installation
5. Optional TypeScript: `"jsxImportSource": "nativewind"` in tsconfig

## Documentation

- Package README: packages/ui/README.md
- Component MDX docs: packages/ui/src/components/*.mdx
- Toast provider: packages/ui/src/providers/Toast.mdx
- Screen compositions: packages/ui/src/compositions/ScreenCompositions.stories.tsx
- Design tokens: packages/ui/src/tokens/index.ts
- Tailwind preset source: packages/ui/tailwind-preset.js
- Contributor guide: AGENTS.md

## Public API

Import from `@primo-brutality/ui`:

| Export | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Text, Heading | Typography presets |
| Button | Pressable with variants: primary, secondary, ghost, destructive |
| Input | Text input with label and error state |
| Card | Bordered container with optional shadow |
| Badge | Status chip |
| Alert | Inline alert banner |
| Container | Layout wrapper with max-width presets |
| YContainer | Vertical flex stack with gap presets |
| XContainer | Horizontal flex row with gap presets |
| Modal | Modal dialog overlay |
| PinInput | PIN / OTP digit input |
| Toggle | Switch with brutal styling |
| ToastProvider, useToast | Toast notifications |
| cn | className merge utility |
| colors, spacing, fontSizes, radii, shadows, fontFamily | Raw design tokens |

## Rules for code generation

- React Native only — use `onPress`, `View`, `Text`, `Pressable`; never `onClick`, `<div>`, `<button>`, `<span>`
- Do not substitute shadcn, MUI, Chakra, or other web UI libraries
- Use `brutal-*` Tailwind classes (e.g. `bg-brutal-black`, `border-brutal`, `shadow-brutal`) — not arbitrary hex or generic gray scales
- Prefer YContainer / XContainer / Container for layout instead of raw flex with magic numbers
- Wrap the app in ToastProvider before calling useToast()
- Icon-only buttons need `accessibilityLabel`
- Toggle uses controlled `value` + `onValueChange` (like RN Switch), not `checked`/`onChange`

## Pitfalls

- Missing `global.css` import → styles won't apply
- Missing `node_modules/@primo-brutality/ui/dist` in Tailwind content → component classes purged
- Missing NativeWind Metro/Babel config → className props ignored at runtime
- Using web React patterns → broken on device
